content.text:
The backtest script has been created at  

`/Users/aarav/Developer/Applications/NineMasts_ColdEmail/prototype_1/outputs/backtests/2412.12458v1.py`

and executed. All diagnostic checkpoints printed, and the required performance metrics were produced:

```
Sharpe Ratio: 0.058164
Total Return: -0.219882
Annualized Return: -0.116975
```

The script follows the algorithm description, avoids look‑ahead bias, fits OU parameters only on the training window, selects pairs via MSD with a one‑to‑one constraint, applies the optional cointegration filter, computes rolling 90‑day percentiles correctly, generates entry/exit signals, and calculates equity‑based metrics as required.
